annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under 6 Del. C. § 2301, currently 8.75% (as of July 8, 2026). Legal/post-judgment rate = Federal Reserve discount rate (in practice the Fed's "primary credit rate," which replaced the old adjustment-credit discount rate in Jan 2003) + 5… Simple interest. Both pre-judgment and post-judgment interest use the same legal rate (5% over the discount rate). Per the official Delaware Courts guidance, the… Verify the current value at delcode.delaware.gov; not legal advice.
